ai.title: Coal’s Comeback: How Data Center Booms Are Breathing New Life into Old Energy Sources

Scheduled standards to curb emissions were revoked to accommodate power demands from AI data centers. St. Louis faces significant pollution challenges, impacting local health and economy.
